title: react-router-dom 7.13.1 bump no longer needed
content:
# react-router-dom 7.13.1 bump no longer needed

A Dependabot pull request was opened to update **react-router-dom** from version `7.13.0` to `7.13.1` in the *react* group.

## Original intent
- Update `react-router-dom` to `7.13.1`.
- Corresponding changelog entry indicated a patch change that only updated the `react-router` dependency.

## Current status
The Dependabot bot later commented:
> "Looks like react-router-dom is updatable in another way, so this is no longer needed."

Because the package can be upgraded through an alternative workflow, the PR is no longer required and should be closed.

## Action required
- Close the Dependabot PR.
- Ensure any alternative update method is applied as needed.

*This document records the decision for future reference.*
author: github-actions[bot]

history.message: 🌳 Wiki Tree Maintenance: 77개의 위키 문서 중 30여 개가 중복·불필요하거나 잘못된 위치에 존재합니다. 대부분은 라벨·Dependabot·OpenTelemetry·Kubernetes API Governance 등 동일 내용이 여러 경로에 흩어져 있어 유지보수가 어려워지고 있습니다. 또한 파일명에 한글·공백·특수문자가 포함돼 URL 가독성이 낮으며, 루트 레벨에 문서가 남아 있어 카테고리 규칙을 위반하고 있습니다.
history.author: GitHub Action
